summary: German Enlightenment playwright and critic. Known for Nathan the Wise, Emilia Galotti, Miss Sara Sampson, and the aesthetic essay Laocoön. Pioneered bourgeois tragedy in Germany.

works.name: Nathan the Wise
works.description: Play about religious tolerance featuring the Ring Parable, told by a Jewish merchant to Saladin.

clues.clue: Nathan tells the Ring Parable to Saladin — a father gives three sons rings, showing all three Abrahamic religions are worthy; based on friend Moses Mendelssohn
examples: a character who delivers the 'Ring Parable' when asked about the 'true religion' by Saladin
used his friend Moses Mendelssohn as the basis for a character

clues.clue: A Christian Templar who saved Nathan's daughter Recha from fire is revealed to be Recha's sibling and Saladin's nephew
examples: a young Templar is the sibling of Recha, the adopted daughter of the protagonist

clues.clue: Mystic Al-Hafi leaves Jerusalem for India
examples: the mystic Al-Hafi leaves Jerusalem for India

clues.clue: Ring Parable first appeared in Boccaccio's Decameron
examples: The first instance of the ring parable was probably in this collection of stories by Boccaccio

works.name: Emilia Galotti
works.description: Bourgeois tragedy about a father who kills his daughter to prevent her seduction by a prince.

clues.clue: Odoardo kills daughter Emilia to save her from Prince Hettore Gonzaga of Guastalla; chamberlain Marinelli schemes
examples: Odoardo kills his daughter to save her from the prince Hettore Gonzaga
chamberlain Marinelli attempts to woo the title woman

clues.clue: Found open in Werther's room after his suicide in Goethe's novel
examples: After Werther's suicide, a copy of this author's play Emilia Galotti is found laying open in his room

works.name: Laocoön
works.description: Aesthetic essay on the limits of painting and poetry.

clues.clue: Essay states painting depicts a single moment while poetry depicts moments in succession; disagrees with Winckelmann
examples: while painting can only depict a single moment, poetry can only depict several moments in succession

clues.clue: Notes that Virgil's Laocoön shrieks but the sculpture does not
examples: notes that Virgil's version of the title character shrieks, yet is the same man

works.name: General
works.description: Miss Sara Sampson and general facts.

clues.clue: Miss Sara Sampson — first German bourgeois tragedy; Mellefont poisons Sara
examples: Mellefont poisons the title character before traveling to Dover to commit suicide
wrote a collection of essays on drama that coined the term 'dramaturgy'

clues.clue: Published Fragments from an Unnamed Author; wrote The Education of the Human Race
examples: posthumously publish the Fragments from an Unnamed Author

comprehensive_summary:
Gotthold Ephraim Lessing (1729-1781) was a German Enlightenment playwright, critic, and aesthetician who pioneered bourgeois tragedy in Germany.

Nathan the Wise is a plea for religious tolerance. The title Jewish merchant, based on Lessing's friend Moses Mendelssohn, tells the Ring Parable to Saladin: a father gives each of his three sons a ring without telling them which is the original, showing all three Abrahamic religions deserve respect. The Parable first appeared in Boccaccio's Decameron. A Christian Templar who saved Nathan's daughter Recha from a fire is revealed to be her sibling and a nephew of Saladin. Lessing wrote the play after his freedom from censorship was revoked by the theologian Johann Goeze.

Emilia Galotti is a bourgeois tragedy in which the chamberlain Marinelli schemes on behalf of Prince Hettore Gonzaga. Odoardo kills his daughter Emilia to preserve her from the prince. The play is found open in Werther's room after his suicide.

The essay Laocoön argues that painting can only depict a single moment while poetry depicts moments in succession, disagreeing with Winckelmann. Miss Sara Sampson was the first German bourgeois tragedy. Hamburg Dramaturgy coined the term 'dramaturgy.'

cards.front: Play: the title Jewish merchant tells the Ring Parable to Saladin — three sons receive rings showing all Abrahamic religions are worthy
Play: Odoardo kills daughter Emilia to save her from Prince Hettore Gonzaga; Marinelli schemes; found open after Werther's suicide
Author: aesthetic essay argues painting depicts a single moment while poetry depicts moments in succession; disagrees with Winckelmann on a Greek sculpture
